name: musikat-sync
author: Max Hartmann
description: Triggers musikat (FastAPI backend) on a schedule for automatic discovery + download. The plugin pulls 'tracks you'd probably like' from your ListenBrainz top-artists via Deezer artist-radio and queues them in musikat.

http.reason: Calls the musikat backend (/api/plugin/health, /api/plugin/library/missing, /api/plugin/sync-status, /api/import/csv*) on the configured host.

scheduler.reason: Registers a recurring cron job to trigger the musikat discovery pipeline (default: daily 07:00).

kvstore.reason: Persists last-run status (timestamps, counts, last error) so the plugin's settings page can show a read-only status block.

musikat_url.title: musikat URL
musikat_url.description: Base URL of the musikat backend. Example: http://musikat.lan:8000 (no trailing slash).

musikat_token.title: API Token
musikat_token.description: Bearer token from musikat's MUSIKAT_API_TOKEN env var. Leave empty if musikat runs without a token.

listenbrainz_user.title: ListenBrainz Username
listenbrainz_user.description: Public LB user whose top-artists drive discovery. No LB token needed.

cron_expression.title: Cron Expression
cron_expression.description: When to run the sync. Default: '0 7 * * *' (daily at 07:00). Use crontab.guru to test custom values.

top_artists.title: Top N Artists
top_artists.description: How many of your most-played LB artists to sample for discovery.

max_queue_per_run.title: Max Queue per Run
max_queue_per_run.description: Hard cap on how many tracks can be queued in a single sync run.
